name: UltraVPN Pro
description: Advanced proxy VPN with live Mullvad server integration — 150+ countries, real server IPs, SOCKS5 authentication.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://ipapi.co https://api.ipify.org https://ip-api.com https://api.mullvad.net
